name: add_dockerfile
brief_template:
To add a Dockerfile:
1. Choose minimal base image (distroless, alpine, or language-specific)
2. Multi-stage build: deps → build → runtime
3. Copy only necessary files; use .dockerignore
4. Expose correct port and set HEALTHCHECK
5. Run as non-root user (USER 1000)
6. Add docker-compose.yml for local development if needed
